findings.description: The email address 'lonnavines@cmlibrary.org' is plain text in the PDF (no underline or hyperlink styling) but is wrapped in a mailto link in the HTML, constituting link injection.
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'lonnavines@cmlibrary.org' as plain text (no color change or underline, unlike 'shirley.liggins@deq.nc.gov' which is visibly hyperlinked). HTML wraps it: lonnavines@cmlibrary.org
